---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new model, service, or configuration option
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What would you like to add or change?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Why is this useful?**
Explain the use case and who would benefit.

**Proposed implementation (optional)**
If you have an idea of how it could be implemented, describe it here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, links, or references here.
